title: Minimum Cost to Merge Stones
hints: Check if merging is possible by verifying if N-1 is divisible by K-1. If not, return -1 immediately.
This is a range dynamic programming problem. Define a state for the minimum cost to merge a subarray into a specific number of piles.
The merge cost for a range is added only when it collapses from K piles to 1. Use prefix sums to quickly calculate the total stones in any range.
